sourceFamilies.name: Official HoYoverse HSR character page
sourceFamilies.notes: The page is JavaScript-heavy, so it is best used as a canonical URL and manually checked in browser when extracting exact character facts.

sourceFamilies.name: HoYoWiki HSR
sourceFamilies.notes: Best source family for structured HSR fields when accessible.

sourceFamilies.name: Official Honkai: Star Rail YouTube
sourceFamilies.notes: Use video metadata later for media reach and official media coverage.

sourceFamilies.name: Wikipedia HSR overview
sourceFamilies.notes: Useful cross-check, not the controlling source for gameplay fields.

sourceFamilies.name: Character-specific reference pages
sourceFamilies.notes: Used when pages exist for major characters such as Kafka, Firefly, and Acheron.

collectionMethod: Find official or structured source family for the character.
Extract stable traits such as path, combat type, faction, rarity, region, release version, and media flags.
Manually code visual traits from official presentation: hair color, outfit colors, weapon/tool, motif, personality tags.
Attach confidence and notes to any trait that is interpreted rather than directly sourced.
Store the cleaned data locally as JSON for deterministic runtime behavior.
